message.content:
STEP 1 COMPLETE — Rules locked.
Key constraints: Primary 2-3, Secondary 2-3, Tertiary max 4.
Options: max 10 per spec, under 25 chars.
Banned: Other, Custom, N/A, Unbranded, As Required.
Output: single JSON, no markdown fences.

STEP 2 COMPLETE — Wiki fully read.

Section 9 Demand Signals (ranked):
  1. Fire-Retardant (FR) Grade → PRIMARY
  2. Panel Thickness → PRIMARY
  3. Aluminum Coil Thickness → PRIMARY
  4. Coating → SECONDARY
  5. Finish → SECONDARY

Section 10 confirms buyers first ask: "Is it fire-proof? What is the FR grade?", "What is the warranty on the colour?", "What is the price per square foot?" (driven by thickness/grade).

Option values extracted from Section 3:
- Fire-Retardant (FR) Grade: Grade A2, Grade B1, Grade B2, Interior Grade
- Panel Thickness: 3 mm, 4 mm, 6 mm, 1 mm, 2 mm, 8 mm
- Aluminum Coil Thickness: 0.12 mm, 0.15 mm, 0.25 mm, 0.30 mm, 0.50 mm
- Coating: PVDF, PE (Polyester), FEVE
- Finish: Wooden, Metallic, Marble, Stone, Mirror, Solid, High-Gloss, Brushed

Price drivers from Section 5: Grade, Coating, Thickness, Finish.
Certifications/use cases from Section 6/7: ISO Certification, Application (Exterior/Interior).
Brand decision from Section 4: Include. Section 9.1 and 4 show high brand dominance (Aludecor, Viva, Alucobond). Tier: Primary candidate (Section 9.1).

Dimension rule: NO. Section 9/10 shows buyers ask for "Panel Thickness" and "Sheet Size" (standardized), not variable custom dimensions as a primary search.

STEP 3 COMPLETE.
Primary: Fire-Retardant (FR) Grade, Panel Thickness, Brand | Secondary: Aluminum Coil Thickness, Coating, Finish | Tertiary: Application, Sheet Size, ISO Certification

Counts valid? Primary [3/3] Secondary [3/3] Tertiary [3/4]

STEP 4 — Audit...

TIERS
  [PASS] Primary = Section 9 top demand signals + Brand (Section 4/9.1)
  [PASS] Secondary = price drivers (Coil thickness, Coating, Finish)
  [PASS] Tertiary = applications/standards
  [PASS] No spec in more than one tier
  [PASS] Single-value specs: None

SPEC NAMES
  [PASS] All names from Section 9 or 10
  [PASS] Title Case, stopwords lowercase
  [PASS] No duplicates, all 1–3 words

BRAND
  [PASS] Section 4 read, dominance checked, Primary tier per Section 9.1

DIMENSIONS
  [PASS] Standardized Sheet Size included in Tertiary as per Section 2.2

OPTIONS
  [PASS] Under 25 chars, no vague values
  [PASS] Correct symbols (–), ordered by buyer frequency
  [PASS] Max 10 per spec

HALLUCINATION
  [PASS] Every spec name and option traceable to wiki

Overall: [ALL PASS → output]

{
  "category_name": "Aluminum Composite Panels",
  "finalized_specs": {
    "finalized_primary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Fire-Retardant (FR) Grade",
          "options": [
            "Grade A2",
            "Grade B1",
            "Grade B2",
            "Interior Grade"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Panel Thickness",
          "options": [
            "4 mm",
            "3 mm",
            "6 mm",
            "2 mm",
            "1 mm",
            "8 mm"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Brand",
          "options": [
            "Aludecor",
            "Viva",
            "Alucobond",
            "ReynoArch",
            "Alstone",
            "Eurobond",
            "Virgo ACP",
            "Alstrong",
            "Citybond",
            "CROSSBOND"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_secondary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Aluminum Coil Thickness",
          "options": [
            "0.50 mm",
            "0.25 mm",
            "0.30 mm",
            "0.20 mm",
            "0.15 mm",
            "0.12 mm"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Coating",
          "options": [
            "PVDF",
            "PE (Polyester)",
            "FEVE"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Finish",
          "options": [
            "Wooden",
            "Metallic",
            "Solid",
            "Marble",
            "Stone",
            "Mirror",
            "High-Gloss",
            "Brushed"
          ],
          "input_type": "multi_select"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_tertiary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Application",
          "options": [
            "Exterior Cladding",
            "Interior Design",
            "Corporate Signage",
            "Public Infrastructure",
            "Transportation"
          ],
          "input_type": "multi_select"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Sheet Size",
          "options": [
            "1220×2440 mm (4×8 ft)",
            "1220×3050 mm (4×10 ft)",
            "1220×3660 mm (4×12 ft)"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "ISO Certification",
          "options": [
            "ISO 9001",
            "ISO 14001",
            "ISO 45001"
          ],
          "input_type": "multi_select"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
